title: chromolaena phyllocephala
intro: Chromolaena phyllocephala, also known as Eupatorium phyllocephalum, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Chromolaena phyllocephala can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
